description: Moltbloat usage tracking and ecosystem health

hooks.command: bash -c 'if [ -f ~/.moltbloat/baseline.json ]; then ts=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; print(json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))[\"timestamp\"][:10])" ~/.moltbloat/baseline.json 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$ts" ]; then days=$(( ( $(date +%s) - $(date -j -f "%Y-%m-%d" "$ts" +%s 2>/dev/null || echo $(date +%s)) ) / 86400 )); if [ "$days" -gt 30 ]; then echo "[moltbloat] Last ecosystem snapshot is ${days} days old. Run /moltbloat:snapshot to check for drift."; fi; fi; fi'
